name: bebop-design-system
description: Bebop Design System — TypeScript design token library

scripts.build: npx tsx preview/src/shell.ts && npx tsx preview/src/patch-shell-store.ts
scripts.build:all: for f in preview/src/*.ts; do case "$f" in *_inject*|*patch-*) ;; *) npx tsx "$f";; esac; done && npx tsx preview/src/patch-shell-store.ts && npx tsx preview/src/_inject.ts
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run serve
